base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_dungeon_block_pushable — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Pushable block — one per room can be pushed to reveal stair. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pushable block — one per room can be pushed to reveal stair; subtle visual difference from fixed blocks
